query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `projectPhases` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `projectId` int NOT NULL,
  `phaseNumber` int NOT NULL,
  `phaseName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `startMonth` int NOT NULL,
  `durationMonths` int NOT NULL,
  `estimatedCost` decimal(15, 2),
  `delayMonths` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `notes` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `projectPhases_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `projectPhases_projectId_projects_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`projectId`) REFERENCES `projects`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `projectCapitalSettings` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `projectId` int NOT NULL,
  `startDate` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `totalBudget` decimal(15, 2),
  `notes` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `projectCapitalSettings_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `projectCapitalSettings_projectId_unique` UNIQUE(`projectId`),
  CONSTRAINT `projectCapitalSettings_projectId_projects_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`projectId`) REFERENCES `projects`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `projectCapitalSettings` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `projectId` int NOT NULL,
  `startDate` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `totalBudget` decimal(15, 2),
